items.name: Mandelbrot-Video
items.description: Mandelbrot CLI: Renderer with Perturbation Theory. The high-precision reference trajectory is computed exactly once, enabling blazing-fast math for billions of pixels using hardware-native double registers (with a 1e-308 hardware limit). Revolutionary Reference Reset to Zero implementation.
